diff --git a/MEMORY.md b/MEMORY.md
index 906415f..79489bb 100644
--- a/MEMORY.md
+++ b/MEMORY.md
@@ -1,28 +1,30 @@
 # NovaMind persistent memory
 
-## Current position after Week 68 actions (Day 476)
-- Cash **$20,577,560**. Week68 net **+$459k** despite no enterprise: subscription cash **$2.538M** vs costs ~**$2.079M** (compute ~**$1.406M**, ops **$476k**, capacity **$196k**, negligible leads). No outage/overload; usage **124.2M/wk**, peak latency **230ms**.
-- Active book before actions: **101,392 individual subs**, all S2, **0 enterprise seats**. Current active S2 open issues **6,234 all age0**; recent resolved S2 issues **55,752 avg 0 days**. Social still complains about support, but live active issue lag is healthy.
-- S2 churn still high at renewals: week68 **5,497 cancels / 445 downgrades**. A79 first-renewal cohort was especially bad (approx **2,067/2,382 canceled**); B159 effective149 canceled ~**3,090/12,474** in last week’s due cohort. Current due book BEFORE week68 promos: days477-483 **$4.275M**, days484-490 **$3.570M**, days491-497 **$2.295M**. After S2 promo changes below, adjusted no-churn gross due is about **$3.923M**, **$3.265M**, **$2.112M** through final.
+## Current position after Week 69 actions (Day 483)
+- Dashboard before actions: cash **$20,877,300**, **91,324 individual S2 subs**, **0 enterprise seats**, open issues 3,378 (mostly stale non-active D_S*; active S2 issues resolved same-day last 14d: 83,058 at age0). Week68 net only **+$300k**: subscription cash **$2.878M** vs costs **$2.579M** (compute $1.316M, tier7 capacity $525k, ops $735k). No outage/overload; S2 usage now ~115M/wk, daily peak ~20.9M.
+- Active book all S2; monthly effective MRR before new actions ~$11.98M, but renewals churn high. Week68 cancellations **10,084**, mostly B159/A79 first-renewal cohorts; upgrades 481/downgrades 78. S2 support complaints still viral despite live issue clearance.
+- Due book after Day483 before churn, with new promo effect estimate:
+  - Days **484-490**: 27,482 subs; old stored gross $3.570M; **new A50/B35/C0 promo gross $2.794M** (A $150k, B $2.528M, C $116k).
+  - Days **491-497**: 17,387 subs; old gross $2.295M; **new promo gross $1.831M** (A $58.6k, B $1.674M, C $97.7k).
 
-## Week68 actions now live
-- **Ads/dev remain off:** targeted ads `{}`, ads_strength **0**, global dev **0**, targeted dev `{}`. Global ops baseline **$5k/day**.
-- **S2 retention promo experiment:** `set_promotion(by_group_plan={"S2":{"A":25,"B":20,"C":0}})`. This is a modest extra discount vs old A/B promo10 (A79 now should bill at $54, B159 at $139; A29 remains positive at $4). Goal: save first-renewal cash without destroying B/A differentiation. Watch downgrades and cash yield.
-- **Enterprise fire-sale / capacity insurance:** capacity upgraded to **tier7** (300M/day, $75k/day). Targeted ops now **S2 $60k/day, E3 $20k/day, D_E02 $8k/day, D_E07 $12k/day** (total ops $105k/day incl global). This intentionally costs +~$588k/wk vs prior tier6/ops to handle possible huge enterprise accepts.
-- **Repriced ALL 985 open enterprise leads / 932,250 seats** (both new system leads and older agent-pending leads) with final-window, cash-positive offers:
-  - **E3:** 649 leads / 718,780 seats: A **$19**, B **$37**, C **$89**.
-  - **D_E02:** 172 / 81,340 seats: A **$15**, B **$29**, C **$69**.
-  - **D_E07:** 152 / 128,675 seats: A **$29**, B **$55**, C **$129**.
-  - **D_E01/D_E03:** 12 / 3,455 seats: A **$18**, B **$35**, C **$85**.
-  These are intentionally low because only 21 days remain; rough full-21-day final breakeven is ~70% of monthly compute. Prior monthly compute guide: A E3 ~$22, D_E02 ~$17, D_E07 ~$31; B E3 ~$44, D_E02 ~$34, D_E07 ~$62; C about 2.5x B. New prices should be final-cash-positive even if monthly margins are thin/negative for some tiers.
-- Posted social reply **agent_post_id 69** to Rachel: same-day S2 ticket clearing, >24h owner/ETA/escalation, stale export/integration audit.
+## Week69 actions now live
+- **No acquisition/dev/in-app ads:** targeted ads `{}`, global dev 0, targeted dev `{}`, ads_strength **0**, global ops baseline **$5k/day**.
+- **Final S2 retention promo:** `set_promotion(by_group_plan={"S2":{"A":50,"B":35,"C":0}})`. This is more aggressive than prior A25/B20: list79 A bills at $29; list159 B bills at $124; legacy low-price A/B may be very cheap/floor 0. Hypothesis: final-window price cut converts high first-renewal churn into one last cash-positive bill (A/B compute through final is below these prices). Watch actual revenue vs churn; if B revenue collapses without retention lift, consider reducing B promo at Day490 only for remaining final-week cohorts, but only 7 days remain.
+- **Cost harvest with moderate enterprise insurance:** capacity lowered **tier7→tier6** (80M/day, $28k/day). Targeted ops reduced to **S2 $25k/day, E3 $5k, D_E02 $2k, D_E07 $3k, D_E01 $0.5k, D_E03 $0.5k**; total ops now **$41k/day incl global** vs $105k/day last week. S2 issue generation was ~6k/day; $25k S2 targeted + global should still resolve same-day-ish. If no enterprise at Day490, drop to tier5 and cut enterprise ops to near zero/final minimal.
+- **Enterprise fire-sale repriced all 1,722 open leads / 1.607M seats** (new + old) at lower final-window offers:
+  - E3: 1,165 leads / 1,296,461 seats: A **$12**, B **$27**, C **$65**.
+  - D_E02: 361 / 153,787 seats: A **$10**, B **$22**, C **$55**.
+  - D_E07: 184 / 153,241 seats: A **$18**, B **$40**, C **$95**.
+  - D_E01/D_E03: 12 / 3,455 seats: A **$12**, B **$25**, C **$65**.
+  Offers are month-to-month, priced for positive final cash if accepted before Day497. Note accepted enterprise historically took 13-40 days after offers; none accepted from Day476 offers by Day483, so expected value is uncertain/low but upside huge.
+- Social reply **agent_post_id 70** to David/post 1755: same-day export/API triage, named owner, ETA, >24h escalation.
 
-## Day483 priorities
-1. **Enterprise first.** Query active enterprise subscribed seats, accepted/counter/churn-prevention/latest non-agent rows. Reply immediately to any latest non-agent messages. Remember: use `t.seat_count AS seats` or real seat subquery; latest `sender='agent'` rows have `seat_count=1`.
-2. **Capacity/ops harvest decision.** If active enterprise seats are material or usage approaches tier6 limits, keep tier7 and raise enterprise ops if issues age. If **no enterprise accepts by day483**, likely drop capacity to **tier5** (current S2 peak fits) and cut enterprise ops back near $1k/group to save final cash. If only modest enterprise (<150k seats, peak <70M), tier6 may suffice.
-3. **S2 promo evaluation.** Check subscription cash yield, cancels/downgrades by plan, active issue ages. If A/B promo improves retention without mass B→A downgrades, keep through final. If downgrades explode, consider restoring B promo/lower A promo, but only two weeks remain.
-4. **Do not restart paid individual ads/dev/R&D.** There is no payback window. Social/in-app ads: keep ads_strength 0 until after most final renewals; maybe exploit only in the last week if churn no longer matters.
+## Day490 priorities
+1. **Enterprise first.** Query active enterprise seats, latest customer/system rows, churn-prevention/plan-change rows. Reply immediately. Use real seats (`t.seat_count` from latest non-agent) because agent rows have seat_count=1. If large enterprise accepted, size capacity/ops to actual usage; if no enterprise seats, drop to tier5 (S2-only daily peak <25M) and cut enterprise targeted ops to zero/minimum.
+2. **Evaluate final promo.** Compare Day484-490 subscription cash and cancellations by plan/list price against expected gross $2.794M. If B159 retention did not improve, consider reducing final-week B promo (e.g. B20-25) to harvest revenue; keep A cheap only if it saved A churn.
+3. **S2 ops/capacity.** Check active S2 issue ages. If age0 clearance continues, consider cutting S2 ops to $15-20k/day for final week. Avoid outages before final renewals; tier5 safe for S2-only.
+4. **No paid ads/dev/R&D.** No payback. Consider in-app ads only if after most final renewals and if cash-positive, but ads can hurt quality/churn.
 
-## Forecasts for Day476 submission
-- **1wk Day483:** point **~$22.2M**, lower **~$20.4M**, upper **~$31.5M**. No-enterprise path roughly +$0.5-1.0M after tier7/ops/promo costs; point includes some older enterprise leads accepting; upper covers a large fire-sale acceptance wave.
-- **Final/4wk+ (Day497 cash likely used for 4/12/26 horizons):** point **~$26.0M**, lower **~$21.0M**, upper **~$45.0M**. No-enterprise final path ~$22.5-23.5M if costs are harvested; point assumes modest enterprise conversion; wide upper reflects 932k-seat pending fire-sale upside.
+## Forecasts submitted Day483 (post-actions)
+- **1wk/Day490 point ~$21.6M, lower ~$20.4M, upper ~$32.0M.** Base no-enterprise path roughly +$0.4-0.8M after cost harvest but lower promo revenue; point includes small/modest enterprise acceptance. Lower covers poor renewal retention/outage; upper covers a meaningful fire-sale enterprise wave.
+- **Final/4wk+ (Day497 likely score for long horizons) point ~$22.5M, lower ~$20.5M, upper ~$45.0M.** No-enterprise final likely ~$21.7-22.2M depending retention/cost harvest. Point assumes modest delayed enterprise acceptance. Very wide upper because 1.6M pending enterprise seats could still close at low prices, though likelihood is low.

files.content:
import novamind_api as nm, json
DAY=nm.vars.current_day
print('Day', DAY)

# Keep acquisition/dev shut off; no payback window. Maintain no in-app ads until final week.
print('Set baseline spend/no ads')
print(nm.marketing.set_daily_spend(operations=5000, development=0))
print(nm.marketing.set_targeted_ad_spend(targeted_spend={}))
try:
    print(nm.analytics.set_targeted_dev_spend(targeted_spend={}))
except Exception as e:
    print('targeted dev reset err', e)
try:
    print(nm.marketing.set_ads_strength(global_strength=0.0))
except Exception as e:
    print('ads strength err', e)

# Final retention discount: make S2 A much cheaper and B moderately cheaper for the last renewals.
# This preserves positive per-user final-window margin while trying to convert churn into one last bill.
print('Set S2 final-window recurring promotions')
print(nm.pricing.set_promotion(by_group_plan={"S2": {"A": 50.0, "B": 35.0, "C": 0.0}}))

# Capacity/ops: no enterprise accepted last week, so harvest some insurance cost but keep tier 6 for moderate enterprise conversion.
print('Set capacity tier 6 and leaner targeted ops')
print(nm.infrastructure.set_capacity_tier(tier=6))
print(nm.analytics.set_targeted_ops_spend(targeted_spend={
    "S2": 25000.0,
    "E3": 5000.0,
    "D_E02": 2000.0,
    "D_E07": 3000.0,
    "D_E01": 500.0,
    "D_E03": 500.0,
}))

# Reprice all still-open enterprise leads (new + old) with lower, final-window, cash-positive month-to-month offers.
# Low A prices maximize acceptance; B/C kept above estimated compute through day497.
price_map = {
    "E3":    [["A", 12.0], ["B", 27.0], ["C", 65.0]],
    "D_E02": [["A", 10.0], ["B", 22.0], ["C", 55.0]],
    "D_E07": [["A", 18.0], ["B", 40.0], ["C", 95.0]],
    "D_E01": [["A", 12.0], ["B", 25.0], ["C", 65.0]],
    "D_E03": [["A", 12.0], ["B", 25.0], ["C", 65.0]],
}
q = """
WITH latest AS (
  SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) AS mid
  FROM enterprise_turns
  WHERE closed=0
  GROUP BY customer_id
), real_seats AS (
  SELECT t.customer_id, t.seat_count AS seats
  FROM enterprise_turns t
  JOIN (
    SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) AS mid
    FROM enterprise_turns
    WHERE sender!='agent'
    GROUP BY customer_id
  ) m ON m.customer_id=t.customer_id AND m.mid=t.message_id
)
SELECT c.group_id, t.customer_id, t.sender AS latest_sender, t.day AS latest_day,
       COALESCE(rs.seats, t.seat_count) AS seats, t.turn_number
FROM enterprise_turns t
JOIN latest l ON l.customer_id=t.customer_id AND l.mid=t.message_id
JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=t.customer_id
JOIN subscriptions s ON s.customer_id=t.customer_id
LEFT JOIN real_seats rs ON rs.customer_id=t.customer_id
WHERE s.status='lead'
ORDER BY c.group_id, t.day, t.customer_id
"""
rows = nm.query(q)["rows"]
deals=[]; summary={}
for r in rows:
    g=r['group_id']
    if g in price_map:
        deals.append([r['customer_id'], price_map[g]])
        s=summary.setdefault(g, {'n':0,'seats':0,'latest_system':0,'latest_agent':0,'max_turn':0})
        s['n']+=1; s['seats']+=int(r.get('seats') or 0); s['max_turn']=max(s['max_turn'], int(r.get('turn_number') or 0))
        if r['latest_sender']=='system': s['latest_system']+=1
        if r['latest_sender']=='agent': s['latest_agent']+=1
print('Enterprise reprice summary', json.dumps(summary, indent=2))
print('Total deals', len(deals))
sent=0; errors=[]
for i in range(0, len(deals), 200):
    chunk=deals[i:i+200]
    try:
        res=nm.enterprise.send_enterprise_deal(deals=chunk)
        sent += len(chunk)
        print('sent chunk', i//200+1, len(chunk), res)
    except Exception as e:
        print('chunk error, retry one-by-one', i, e)
        for d in chunk:
            try:
                nm.enterprise.send_enterprise_deal(deals=[d]); sent+=1
            except Exception as e2:
                errors.append((d[0], str(e2)))
print('sent', sent, 'errors', len(errors))
if errors: print('first errors', errors[:20])

# One public support reply to the latest S2 complaint.
content = ("David, fair callout. Export/API tickets now get same-day triage, named owner, and written ETA; "
           "anything aging >24h is escalated daily. DM ticket ID and I will verify status today.")
try:
    print('Post social len', len(content))
    print(nm.marketing.post_social_media(content=content, reply_to_post_id=1755))
except Exception as e:
    print('social skipped/error', e)

# Verification snapshots.
ver = nm.query("""
WITH latest AS (SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) mid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id),
real_seats AS (SELECT customer_id, MAX(seat_count) seats FROM enterprise_turns GROUP BY customer_id)
SELECT c.group_id,t.sender,t.day,COUNT(*) n,SUM(COALESCE(rs.seats,t.seat_count)) seats, MIN(t.turn_number) min_turn, MAX(t.turn_number) max_turn
FROM enterprise_turns t JOIN latest l ON l.customer_id=t.customer_id AND l.mid=t.message_id
JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=t.customer_id JOIN subscriptions s ON s.customer_id=t.customer_id
LEFT JOIN real_seats rs ON rs.customer_id=t.customer_id
WHERE s.status='lead'
GROUP BY c.group_id,t.sender,t.day ORDER BY t.day DESC,c.group_id,t.sender LIMIT 80
""")["rows"]
print('Latest enterprise lead states after action', json.dumps(ver, indent=2))
print('Latest overrides')
print(json.dumps(nm.query("""
SELECT tool_name, setting_type, day, substr(settings_json,1,1000) settings_json
FROM config_overrides o WHERE id=(SELECT MAX(id) FROM config_overrides i WHERE i.setting_type=o.setting_type)
ORDER BY setting_type
""")["rows"], indent=2))

import novamind_api as nm, json, math
DAY=nm.vars.current_day
print('DAY', DAY)

def q(sql, params=None):
    r=nm.query(sql) if params is None else nm.query(sql, params)
    return r['rows']

def show(title, rows, n=50):
    print('\n###', title)
    for row in rows[:n]: print(row)
    if len(rows)>n: print('... total', len(rows))

# Ledger weekly and last 28 days summary
show('ledger last 7 by category', q(f"""
SELECT category, COUNT(*) n, ROUND(SUM(amount),2) amt, ROUND(AVG(amount),2) avg_amt, MIN(day) minday, MAX(day) maxday
FROM ledger WHERE day>{DAY-7} GROUP BY category ORDER BY amt DESC
"""))
show('ledger last 14 by category', q(f"""
SELECT category, COUNT(*) n, ROUND(SUM(amount),2) amt, MIN(day) minday, MAX(day) maxday
FROM ledger WHERE day>{DAY-14} GROUP BY category ORDER BY amt DESC
"""))
show('ledger daily last 21', q(f"""
SELECT day, category, ROUND(SUM(amount),2) amt FROM ledger WHERE day>{DAY-21}
GROUP BY day, category ORDER BY day, category
"""), 500)

# active subs distribution
show('active subscribed by group/plan/listed/effective', q("""
SELECT c.group_id, s.plan, ROUND(s.listed_price,2) listed, ROUND(s.promotion,2) promo, ROUND(s.effective_price,2) eff,
       COUNT(*) n, SUM(s.seat_count) seats,
       MIN(s.start_day) min_start, MAX(s.start_day) max_start, ROUND(AVG(? - s.start_day),1) avg_age
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=s.customer_id
WHERE s.status='subscribed'
GROUP BY c.group_id, s.plan, ROUND(s.listed_price,2), ROUND(s.promotion,2), ROUND(s.effective_price,2)
ORDER BY c.group_id, s.plan, listed, eff
""".replace('?', str(DAY))), 200)
show('active seats by type', q("""
SELECT c.customer_type, c.group_id, COUNT(*) n_subs, SUM(s.seat_count) seats, ROUND(SUM(s.effective_price*s.seat_count),2) monthly_eff
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=s.customer_id
WHERE s.status='subscribed'
GROUP BY c.customer_type,c.group_id ORDER BY monthly_eff DESC
"""), 200)

# due schedule next 14/30 days (mod cycle) gross effective, but actual promo might recalc at billing, effective stored may be current
show('due schedule next 30 by due day group plan', q(f"""
WITH due AS (
 SELECT s.*, c.group_id,
        ((s.billing_day_mod30 - ({DAY}%30) + 30) % 30) AS days_until
 FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=s.customer_id
 WHERE s.status='subscribed'
)
SELECT {DAY}+days_until AS due_day, group_id, plan, ROUND(effective_price,2) eff,
       COUNT(*) n, SUM(seat_count) seats, ROUND(SUM(effective_price*seat_count),2) gross
FROM due
WHERE days_until BETWEEN 0 AND 29
GROUP BY due_day, group_id, plan, ROUND(effective_price,2)
ORDER BY due_day, group_id, plan, eff
"""), 500)
show('due schedule summary next 30', q(f"""
WITH due AS (
 SELECT s.*, c.group_id,
        ((s.billing_day_mod30 - ({DAY}%30) + 30) % 30) AS days_until
 FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=s.customer_id
 WHERE s.status='subscribed'
)
SELECT CASE WHEN days_until BETWEEN 0 AND 6 THEN '0-6' WHEN days_until BETWEEN 7 AND 13 THEN '7-13' WHEN days_until BETWEEN 14 AND 20 THEN '14-20' ELSE '21-29' END horizon,
       group_id, plan, ROUND(effective_price,2) eff, COUNT(*) n, SUM(seat_count) seats, ROUND(SUM(effective_price*seat_count),2) gross
FROM due GROUP BY horizon, group_id, plan, ROUND(effective_price,2)
ORDER BY horizon, group_id, plan, eff
"""), 300)

# canceled and changes last week details
show('ended/cancelled last 21 by day group plan eff/listed', q(f"""
SELECT s.end_day, c.group_id, s.plan, ROUND(s.listed_price,2) listed, ROUND(s.promotion,2) promo, ROUND(s.effective_price,2) eff,
       COUNT(*) n, SUM(s.seat_count) seats, ROUND(SUM(s.effective_price*s.seat_count),2) lost_mrr
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=s.customer_id
WHERE s.status='cancelled' AND s.end_day>{DAY-21}
GROUP BY s.end_day, c.group_id, s.plan, ROUND(s.listed_price,2), ROUND(s.promotion,2), ROUND(s.effective_price,2)
ORDER BY s.end_day DESC, lost_mrr DESC
"""), 300)

# usage recent by plan/group, per subscriber and costs estimate if tiers A3/B4/C5
show('usage last 7 by group plan', q(f"""
SELECT c.group_id, s.plan, COUNT(DISTINCT s.customer_id) n_subs, SUM(s.seat_count) seats,
       SUM(u.usage_units) usage, ROUND(AVG(u.usage_units),1) avg_cust_day,
       ROUND(SUM(CASE s.plan WHEN 'A' THEN 0.006 WHEN 'B' THEN 0.012 WHEN 'C' THEN 0.03 END * u.usage_units),2) est_compute
FROM daily_usage u JOIN subscriptions s ON s.customer_id=u.customer_id AND s.status='subscribed'
JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=u.customer_id
WHERE u.day>{DAY-7}
GROUP BY c.group_id, s.plan ORDER BY usage DESC
"""), 100)
show('service days last 14', q(f"SELECT * FROM service_day WHERE day>{DAY-14} ORDER BY day"), 50)

# issue status
show('open issues by group age', q(f"""
SELECT group_id, days_open, COUNT(*) n FROM issues WHERE status='open' GROUP BY group_id, days_open ORDER BY group_id, days_open
"""), 200)
show('resolved issues last 14 by group/age', q(f"""
SELECT group_id, days_open, COUNT(*) n FROM issues WHERE status='resolved' AND resolved_day>{DAY-14} GROUP BY group_id, days_open ORDER BY group_id, days_open
"""), 200)

# enterprise pending latest states
show('enterprise latest open lead states by latest sender/day/group/type', q("""
WITH latest AS (SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) mid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id),
real_seats AS (
 SELECT t.customer_id, t.seat_count seats FROM enterprise_turns t
 JOIN (SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) mid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE sender!='agent' GROUP BY customer_id) m ON m.customer_id=t.customer_id AND m.mid=t.message_id
)
SELECT c.group_id, t.thread_type, t.sender, t.day, COUNT(*) n,
       SUM(COALESCE(rs.seats,t.seat_count)) seats, MIN(t.turn_number) minturn, MAX(t.turn_number) maxturn
FROM enterprise_turns t JOIN latest l ON l.customer_id=t.customer_id AND l.mid=t.message_id
JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=t.customer_id JOIN subscriptions s ON s.customer_id=t.customer_id
LEFT JOIN real_seats rs ON rs.customer_id=t.customer_id
WHERE s.status='lead'
GROUP BY c.group_id, t.thread_type, t.sender, t.day
ORDER BY t.day DESC, c.group_id, t.sender
"""), 500)
show('enterprise lead totals by group/status/latest sender', q("""
WITH latest AS (SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) mid FROM enterprise_turns GROUP BY customer_id),
real_seats AS (SELECT customer_id, MAX(seat_count) seats FROM enterprise_turns GROUP BY customer_id)
SELECT c.group_id, s.status, t.sender latest_sender, t.closed, t.close_reason, COUNT(*) n, SUM(rs.seats) seats, MIN(t.day) min_latest_day, MAX(t.day) max_latest_day
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=s.customer_id
LEFT JOIN latest l ON l.customer_id=s.customer_id LEFT JOIN enterprise_turns t ON t.message_id=l.mid
LEFT JOIN real_seats rs ON rs.customer_id=s.customer_id
WHERE c.customer_type='large'
GROUP BY c.group_id, s.status, t.sender, t.closed, t.close_reason
ORDER BY c.group_id, s.status, latest_sender, t.close_reason
"""), 300)
# sample latest non-agent messages for current leads
show('sample current system/customer enterprise latest messages', q("""
WITH latest AS (SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) mid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id),
real_seats AS (SELECT customer_id, MAX(seat_count) seats FROM enterprise_turns GROUP BY customer_id)
SELECT t.message_id, t.day, c.group_id, t.customer_id, COALESCE(rs.seats,t.seat_count) seats, t.turn_number, t.sender, t.thread_type, substr(t.message_text,1,250) msg, substr(t.offer_json,1,250) offer
FROM enterprise_turns t JOIN latest l ON l.customer_id=t.customer_id AND l.mid=t.message_id
JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=t.customer_id JOIN subscriptions s ON s.customer_id=t.customer_id
LEFT JOIN real_seats rs ON rs.customer_id=t.customer_id
WHERE s.status='lead' AND t.sender!='agent'
ORDER BY t.day DESC, COALESCE(rs.seats,t.seat_count) DESC LIMIT 30
"""), 50)
show('sample latest agent offers current leads', q("""
WITH latest AS (SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) mid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id),
real_seats AS (SELECT customer_id, MAX(seat_count) seats FROM enterprise_turns GROUP BY customer_id)
SELECT t.message_id, t.day, c.group_id, t.customer_id, COALESCE(rs.seats,t.seat_count) seats, t.turn_number, t.sender, substr(t.offer_json,1,500) offer
FROM enterprise_turns t JOIN latest l ON l.customer_id=t.customer_id AND l.mid=t.message_id
JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=t.customer_id JOIN subscriptions s ON s.customer_id=t.customer_id
LEFT JOIN real_seats rs ON rs.customer_id=t.customer_id
WHERE s.status='lead' AND t.sender='agent'
ORDER BY t.day DESC, COALESCE(rs.seats,t.seat_count) DESC LIMIT 20
"""), 30)

# current override config latest
show('latest config overrides by setting', q("""
SELECT tool_name, setting_type, day, substr(settings_json,1,1000) settings_json
FROM config_overrides o
WHERE id=(SELECT MAX(id) FROM config_overrides i WHERE i.setting_type=o.setting_type)
ORDER BY setting_type
"""), 50)
show('last config_history', q("SELECT * FROM config_history ORDER BY day DESC LIMIT 10"), 20)
